tools.name: getAll
tools.description: Get all programming languages from the database. Returns a list of all programming languages with their IDs and names.

tools.name: getByIdLanguage
tools.description: Get a specific programming language by its ID. Returns the programming language details if found.

tools.name: add
tools.description: Create a new programming language in the database. The name must be unique and between 2-50 characters.

tools.name: update
tools.description: Update an existing programming language by ID. The name must be unique and between 2-50 characters.

tools.name: delete
tools.description: Delete a programming language by its ID. This will also delete all associated technologies.

tools.name: getAllTechnologies
tools.description: Get all technologies from the database. Returns a list of all technologies with their IDs and names.

tools.name: getByIdTechnology
tools.description: Get a specific technology by its ID. Returns the technology details if found.

tools.name: addTechnology
tools.description: Create a new technology in the database. The name must be unique and between 2-50 characters.

tools.name: updateTechnology
tools.description: Update an existing technology by ID. The name must be unique and between 2-50 characters.

tools.name: deleteTechnology
tools.description: Delete a technology by its ID.

tools.name: register
tools.description: Register a new user in the system. Creates a user account with the specified username, password, and role. Returns a JWT token for authentication.

tools.name: login
tools.description: Login to the system with existing credentials. Returns a JWT token for authentication that can be used for subsequent API calls.
